hooks.command: missing=""; which pdftoppm >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }poppler (brew install poppler)"; which node >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }Node.js (brew install node)"; which python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }Python 3 (brew install python)"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then printf '{"result": "warn", "message": "Talk Builder: missing system dependencies: %s"}' "$missing"; fi

VENV="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/venv"; if [ -d "$VENV" ] && "$VENV/bin/python3" -c 'import pptx, yaml, lxml, docling' 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; python3 -m venv "$VENV" 2>/dev/null && "$VENV/bin/pip" install --quiet -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/assets/scripts/requirements.txt" 2>/dev/null || printf '{"result": "warn", "message": "Talk Builder: failed to install Python dependencies. Run manually: python3 -m venv ~/.claude/plugins/data/talk-builder/venv && ~/.claude/plugins/data/talk-builder/venv/bin/pip install python-pptx PyYAML lxml"}'
